mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOG_GG_USER ( USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PW,USER_NAME, STATUS, WITHDRAW, ENROLL_DATE,MODIFIED_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL,#{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, DEFAULT,DEFAULT, DEFAULT, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LOG_GG_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'Y' AND WITHDRAW = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE LOG_GG_USER SET STATUS = 'N', WITHDRAW = 'Y', MODIFIED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND BOARD_CD = 'Y') AS boardCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND STATUS = 'Y') AS replyCount FROM DUAL
